posts.author: Vermland (Anton Bak)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Is it possible to copy/mirror a value (number) from an item (specific column) to another boards specific column and make it as a constant for all items created there? My problem is that I’ve used a formula in my highlevel board that generates a specific number that I want to use as constant for a formula column in my project boards. The number has to automatically update the project board of the value changes in the high level board.

Hope it make sense and that you have an answer out there!
